fixes_applied.description: Removed unused import 'from helper.print_history_helper import PrintHistoryHelper' as PrintHistoryHelper is never called in the script
common.setup() is correctly present on line 3 of the function body - this is not a violation
Consolidated multiple log lines in Step 10 into a single concise log statement: 'Step 10: Simulated printing 6 pages and verified 6 pages recorded'
Restructured page additions file to show locator definitions are additions to existing Elements class, not a new standalone class. Removed class declaration and added clear merge instructions.
Removed instructions to create separate locator properties. Updated merge instructions to clarify Elements class stores selector strings accessed via page.locator(page_obj.elements.X)

The method common.get_subscription_id() does not exist in the codebase. Added TODO comment and replaced with alternative approach using subscription_data_from_gemini(). This is a partial fix - the correct method signature needs to be verified.

The method GeminiRAHelper.pause_subscription() does not exist in the codebase. Added TODO comment indicating need to use correct GeminiRAHelper methods to pause subscription. This requires manual intervention to implement the pause subscription flow.

Removed pages_printed parameter from second common.send_rtp_devicestatus() call (Step 12) as the method signature does not accept this parameter.
